name: Happy Horse Farm & Garden Pump Sprayer, 1-gal
description: The Happy Horse Farm & Garden Pump Sprayer makes it super easy to spray around your home and barn. It features an adjustable nozzle and is chemical-resistant, so it’s suitable for use with all sorts of chemicals. The nozzle adjusts from a fine mist to a direct stream, ideal for all of your application needs. A large comfort grip handle makes for easy pumping and carrying, while a galvanized steel pump is super durable. This sprayer is an ideal option for use with weed killers, crop performance materials and pest maintenance chemicals.
